## What changed

Describe the specification, pack, tooling, or documentation changes.

## Why

Explain the user or developer problem and distinguish sourced facts from author recommendations.

## Evidence and risk

- Sources reviewed:
- Risk level affected:
- Domain expert review, if applicable:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] I inspected `site/index.html` when tokens or manifests changed.
- [ ] I added or updated an evaluation case for behavior changes.
- [ ] No proprietary logos, fonts, screenshots, or copied design-system text are included.
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, stale/partial, offline, and denied behavior remain covered.
